name: Atlantic Gold Corporation
description: Atlantic Gold Corporation is a Canadian gold mining company focused on the exploration, development, and operation of gold properties in Nova Scotia, Canada. The company's flagship project is the Moose River Consolidated (MRC) Gold Project, which includes the operating Touquoy open-pit mine. Atlantic Gold is dedicated to low-cost, efficient gold production through open-pit mining and conventional processing methods, aiming to create sustainable value for its shareholders and local communities.
